tasks.title: LRU Cache
tasks.description: Implement a class `LRUCache` with a constructor `__init__(self, capacity: int)`, a method `get(self, key: int) -> int` that returns the value or -1 if not found, and a method `put(self, key: int, value: int) -> None` that inserts or updates the key. When capacity is exceeded, evict the least recently used item. Both `get` and `put` must run in O(1).
tests: cache = LRUCache(2); cache.put(1, 1); cache.put(2, 2); assert cache.get(1) == 1
cache = LRUCache(2); cache.put(1, 1); cache.put(2, 2); cache.get(1); cache.put(3, 3); assert cache.get(2) == -1
cache = LRUCache(1); cache.put(1, 1); cache.put(2, 2); assert cache.get(1) == -1; assert cache.get(2) == 2
hidden_tests: cache = LRUCache(2); cache.put(1, 1); cache.put(2, 2); cache.get(1); cache.put(3, 3); assert cache.get(1) == 1; assert cache.get(3) == 3
cache = LRUCache(3); cache.put(1,1); cache.put(2,2); cache.put(3,3); cache.put(4,4); assert cache.get(1) == -1

tasks.title: Word ladder length
tasks.description: Write a Python function `word_ladder(begin_word: str, end_word: str, word_list: list[str]) -> int` that returns the length of the shortest transformation sequence from begin_word to end_word where each step changes exactly one letter and each intermediate word must be in word_list. Return 0 if no path exists.

expected_output.signature: def word_ladder(begin_word: str, end_word: str, word_list: list[str]) -> int

tasks.title: Serialize and deserialize binary tree
tasks.description: Write two Python functions: `serialize(root) -> str` that encodes a binary tree to a string, and `deserialize(data: str) -> TreeNode` that decodes that string back to a binary tree. Use a simple `TreeNode` class with `val`, `left`, `right` attributes.
tests: root = TreeNode(1); root.left = TreeNode(2); root.right = TreeNode(3); data = serialize(root); t = deserialize(data); assert t.val == 1 and t.left.val == 2 and t.right.val == 3
root = TreeNode(1); data = serialize(root); t = deserialize(data); assert t.val == 1 and t.left is None and t.right is None
hidden_tests: root = TreeNode(1); root.left = TreeNode(2); root.left.left = TreeNode(4); data = serialize(root); t = deserialize(data); assert t.left.left.val == 4
root = TreeNode(5); root.right = TreeNode(3); data = serialize(root); t = deserialize(data); assert t.right.val == 3 and t.left is None

tasks.title: Median of two sorted arrays
tasks.description: Write a Python function `find_median_sorted_arrays(nums1: list[int], nums2: list[int]) -> float` that finds the median of two sorted arrays in O(log(m+n)) time.

expected_output.signature: def find_median_sorted_arrays(nums1: list[int], nums2: list[int]) -> float

tasks.title: Trapping rain water
tasks.description: Write a Python function `trap(height: list[int]) -> int` that computes how much water can be trapped between the bars represented by the height array.

tasks.title: Edit distance
tasks.description: Write a Python function `edit_distance(word1: str, word2: str) -> int` that returns the minimum number of operations (insert, delete, replace) to convert word1 to word2.

expected_output.signature: def edit_distance(word1: str, word2: str) -> int
